citation: 7 CFR Part 3555 + USDA SFH GLP — 5-8-person band (no uplift)
comment: Hand-calc: household_size=7 falls in the 5-8 band (NOT > 8) -> applicable_income_limit = persons_5_to_8 = $158,250 with NO per-extra-member uplift (uplift only applies for sizes > 8). household_income=$165,000 > $158,250 -> income_eligible=False. This pins the band-boundary behavior so future readers do not accidentally apply uplift at family-size 6 or 7.
